strategy: Death boss (2,580 health) fought alongside Brulee Sucre: hit with Life (+20%); Death is resisted 50%. He cannot be stunned.
When you attack Claudas he Steals Health from Brulee Sucre to top himself up, so take Brulee Sucre out first to cut off his health source.
Every third round he cheat-casts Dark Pact to sharpen his damage at the cost of his own health.
With Brulee gone, stack Life blades and burst Claudas down before another Dark Pact cycle.
cheatNotes: Attacking him makes him Steal Health from Brulee Sucre to heal, so kill Brulee Sucre first and he has nothing to drain.
Every third round he casts Dark Pact for more damage, spending his own health to do it, so expect harder hits but a lower health pool.
